---
title: "Dora Frances Martin"
---

## Dora Frances Martin

**Dates:** (18 Dec 1841-24 Jan 1926)

**Maiden name:** (Moberly)

### Description

daughter of the Rt. Rev. George Moberly

### Biography

She married (14 Sept 1869) the Rev, Charles Martin (17 Oct 1840-23 Feb 1910), Warden of Radley Coll, Rector of Dartington.  Their fourth son was the Rev. William Keble Martin (1877-1969), the botanical artist. [LG 1975 Moberly, Bromley-Martin]

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 29th 1877 
- Letter from [November 1868]
- Letter from Novr 24th 1858
- Letter from June 1855.
- Letter from June 1854.
- Letter from Friday 30th Oct? [sic] [1846]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
